content:
# Growth Kinetics

**Summary**: The study of the rate of change of living systems, specifically cell growth in culture.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] analyzed growth kinetics by measuring optical density and dry weight under varying conditions.

- [[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017]] analyzed growth kinetics to determine optimal conditions for bacterial strains.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] Essential for determining the optimal conditions for industrial-scale cultivation.

- [[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017]] analyzed growth kinetics to determine optimal conditions for bacterial strains.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] Measured via optical density and dry weight at regular intervals.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- All studied strains showed the start of exponential phase after 16 days of cultivation at T1. ([[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016, p. 57]])


- Doubling times (dt) were used to compare growth rates, with Halomonas smyrnensis 20PY1A showing the fastest growth at 37°C. ([[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017, p. 61]])
